subtopics.description: Understand what the participant does at work and how long they have been in this profession.
coverage_criteria: The participant has named their job title or role (e.g. 'nurse', 'software engineer', 'PhD student'). Any brief mention is sufficient — do not probe for more detail.

The participant has indicated approximately how long they have been in this profession or field — a rough range is sufficient (e.g. 'a few years', '10 years', 'just started'). Any single duration answer (even a short tenure like '1 year') satisfies this criterion. Do NOT ask a follow-up zooming out to broader experience in the same field.
The participant has named a task they regularly do (a brief high-level mention is sufficient — do not probe for additional tasks here).
